flair_enforcement_enabled.label: Enable Flair Enforcement
flair_enforcement_enabled.helpText: When disabled, Artemis will not remind users about missing post flair or remove unflaired posts.

flair_enforce_moderators.label: Enforce Flair on Moderator Posts
flair_enforce_moderators.helpText: Apply flair enforcement to posts made by subreddit moderators.

flair_enforce_approve_posts.label: Approve Flaired Posts
flair_enforce_approve_posts.helpText: Approve posts that Artemis removed once they receive an allowed flair.

flair_enforce_custom_message.label: Custom Flair Reminder Message
flair_enforce_custom_message.helpText: Optional moderator-provided text included in flair reminder messages. Messages over 500 characters are truncated.

flair_enforce_whitelist.label: Flair Enforcement Whitelist
flair_enforce_whitelist.helpText: Optional usernames to skip, separated by commas or new lines. Do not include u/.

flair_tag_nsfw.label: NSFW Flair Template IDs
flair_tag_nsfw.helpText: Optional post flair template IDs that should mark matching posts as NSFW. Separate IDs with commas or new lines.

flair_tag_spoiler.label: Spoiler Flair Template IDs
flair_tag_spoiler.helpText: Optional post flair template IDs that should mark matching posts as spoilers. Separate IDs with commas or new lines.

flair_schedule_rule_1_ids.label: Scheduled Flair Rule 1 IDs
flair_schedule_rule_1_ids.helpText: Optional post flair template IDs for this schedule rule. Separate IDs with commas or new lines.

flair_schedule_rule_1_days.label: Scheduled Flair Rule 1 Days
flair_schedule_rule_1_days.helpText: Weekdays when Rule 1 flair IDs are allowed.

flair_schedule_rule_2_ids.label: Scheduled Flair Rule 2 IDs
flair_schedule_rule_2_ids.helpText: Optional post flair template IDs for this schedule rule. Separate IDs with commas or new lines.

flair_schedule_rule_2_days.label: Scheduled Flair Rule 2 Days
flair_schedule_rule_2_days.helpText: Weekdays when Rule 2 flair IDs are allowed.

flair_schedule_rule_3_ids.label: Scheduled Flair Rule 3 IDs
flair_schedule_rule_3_ids.helpText: Optional post flair template IDs for this schedule rule. Separate IDs with commas or new lines.

flair_schedule_rule_3_days.label: Scheduled Flair Rule 3 Days
flair_schedule_rule_3_days.helpText: Weekdays when Rule 3 flair IDs are allowed.

flair_schedule_rule_4_ids.label: Scheduled Flair Rule 4 IDs
flair_schedule_rule_4_ids.helpText: Optional post flair template IDs for this schedule rule. Separate IDs with commas or new lines.

flair_schedule_rule_4_days.label: Scheduled Flair Rule 4 Days
flair_schedule_rule_4_days.helpText: Weekdays when Rule 4 flair IDs are allowed.

flair_schedule_rule_5_ids.label: Scheduled Flair Rule 5 IDs
flair_schedule_rule_5_ids.helpText: Optional post flair template IDs for this schedule rule. Separate IDs with commas or new lines.

flair_schedule_rule_5_days.label: Scheduled Flair Rule 5 Days
flair_schedule_rule_5_days.helpText: Weekdays when Rule 5 flair IDs are allowed.

custom_goodbye.label: Custom Goodbye
custom_goodbye.helpText: Optional short sign-off used in flair reminder messages. Values over 20 characters are truncated.
